_meta.keyKnowledge: We create devised and scripted drama using expressive skills, performance styles and design elements.

_source.w: We create devised and scripted drama using expressive skills, performance styles and design elements.
y: Creating drama lets us explore complex ideas and develop empathy for different perspectives.
Working with drama conventions and styles expands our creative toolkit as storytellers.
Developing original drama builds collaboration, problem-solving and creative thinking.
eg: We explore physical and fictional spaces to develop characters and stories.
We vary vocal techniques like projection, pause and emphasis to create dramatic effect.
We create scripted scenes that use tension, contrast and dramatic meaning.
We use design elements like simple lighting, sound or costume to enhance our drama.
We devise drama that explores different perspectives on a real-world issue.
We experiment with different drama forms — monologue, documentary drama, tableau.
